name: agent-guards
description: Runnable skills that return an exit code you can enforce — token budget audits, hallucination triage, cross-surface open-loop tracking, subscription cleanup, and gate maintenance. Real tools, not prompt wrappers.

plugins.name: agent-guards
plugins.description: Five runnable skills that hold a line with an exit code: context-budget (audit per-turn token cost, fail CI when the agent gets fatter), claim-audit (separate grounded/hedged/bare factual claims to catch likely hallucinations), open-loops (extract unresolved commitments, deferrals, and open questions from a transcript so cron/triggers don't lose thread context), subscription-audit (find the recurring charges hiding in a bank/card CSV, report true monthly/yearly cost, flag the forgotten ones worth cancelling), and gate-graph (AST overlap analysis for validator/middleware gates to detect duplicate checks and dead modules). Dependency-light Python, exit-code gates, not prompt wrappers.
